title: Get started with Azure Quantum
summary: Intrigued by quantum computing but don't know where to start? This learning path helps prepare you for this exciting next generation of computing.

sections.title: Get started with Azure Quantum
sections.summary: Intrigued by quantum computing but don't know where to start? This learning path helps prepare you for this exciting next generation of computing.

lessons.title: Introduction to quantum computing with Azure Quantum
lessons.content_md:
Get started with quantum computing and the Azure Quantum service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-quantum/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to quantum computing with Azure Quantum

lessons.title: Choose the best Azure Quantum option for your needs
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to get started with Azure Quantum and choose the best option for your needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/choose-the-best-azure-quantum/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Choose the best Azure Quantum option for your needs

lessons.title: Create your first Q# program with the Microsoft Quantum Development Kit
lessons.content_md:
Get started with Q# programming by building a quantum random number generator.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/qsharp-create-first-quantum-development-kit/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create your first Q# program with the Microsoft Quantum Development Kit

lessons.title: Explore quantum superposition with Q#
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the concept of superposition in quantum computing, how to represent superposition states for a single qubit with the Bloch sphere, and how to create and analyze superposition states with Q#.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-superposition/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Teleport entangled qubits with Q#
lessons.content_md:
Teleport entangled qubits with Q#

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-entanglement/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Estimate physical resource requirements for quantum algorithms with the Microsoft Quantum resource estimator
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to get started with Microsoft Quantum resource estimator.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/estimate-resources-quantum-algorithms/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Estimate physical resource requirements for quantum algorithms with the Microsoft Quantum resource estimator

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Get started with Azure Quantum
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Get started with Azure Quantum**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
